name: Tamas Pride
tagline: A bold celebration of Tamas, Hungarian pride, and living authentically.
thesis: Tamas Pride is a joyful tribute page built around friendship, Hungarian heritage, and unapologetic LGBTQ+ self-expression. It gives friends a warm, shareable way to celebrate Tamas while keeping his dignity and consent at the center.
audience: Friends and chosen family creating an affirming tribute for someone they love.
proofPoints: A vibrant tribute pairs Hungarian-inspired colors with the full spectrum of Pride.
Friends can contribute affirming stories, photos, and messages with Tamas's approval.
The concept celebrates identity without stereotypes, rankings, or invasive personal details.

launchChecks.label: Ask Tamas for consent and creative input
Open a moderated friends tribute wall
